source_pr.title: store/tikv: fix region cache data race.
source_pr.body: RegionCache need update region's fields in multiple threads, we should not use `*Region` without aquire the mutex.

symptoms: store/tikv: fix region cache data race.
failure_signature: store/tikv: fix region cache data race.
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by a Go data race in RegionCache: region cache entries (and their fields) can be accessed/updated by multiple goroutines, and returning/using a cached `*Region` after releasing the lock (or updating leader info without proper locking) can lead to unsynchronized reads/writes and race-detector failures. This PR stabilizes it by tightening locking around cache access (introducing lock-scoped helpers) and by copying out the needed immutable fields (meta/peer) before unlocking so the returned RPC context does not race with cache updates.
fix_pattern: Protect RegionCache access with proper locking (or clone fields before unlock) so cached region structures are never read/written concurrently without synchronization.

evidence: evidence: store/tikv: fix region cache data race.
